title: (Bearish Signal) DEN, entered Downtrend as Momentum indicator drops below 0 level on May 13, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that DEN's price has further to drop, since it fell below its price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 84 similar cases where DEN's Momentum Indicator fell below the 0 level, and 70 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 83%. Current price $51.85 crossed the support line at $52.37 and is trading between $52.37 support and $50.01 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/13/21 - 05/13/21, the price experienced a +13% Uptrend, while the week of 05/06/21 - 05/13/21 shows a -7% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/38sj52rd34z61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=0436256000b5870f55dc48e4a26344d8129a047e

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for DEN moved out of overbought territory on May 10, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 36 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 30 of the 36 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 83%.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on May 13, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on DEN as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 70 of 84 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 83%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where DEN declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 87%.

DEN broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 26, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/11173826-denbury-inc-ordinary-shares-new-den-53-entered-downtrend-as-momentum-indicator-drops-below-0-level-on-may-13-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
